title: LineBidiPublicTypes
description: Public types for the icu_segmenter + unicode-bidi backed line-breaking and bidirectional-text engine (Phase 6b). Companion machine-readable contract for `line-bidi.md`. Cross-references: text-shaping.md (ShapedRun + FontError + shape_text inputs), paint-runtime.md (consumes Paragraph after visual-order resolution), layout-runtime.md (consumes line_breaks for line wrap).

ScriptRun.description: UAX #24 script run. `script` MUST be `unicode_script::Script::full_name()` PascalCase form. Common/Inherited codepoints lookahead-merge into the FIRST concrete script run that follows; pure-Common input emits a single ScriptRun with script="Common".

script.description: PascalCase Unicode script property name (e.g. Latin, Han, Arabic, Common). NOT the ISO 15924 short_name.

Paragraph.description: Aggregate output of shape_paragraph. `runs` is in LOGICAL byte-offset order — consumers iterate `bidi_runs.level` to resolve visual order at paint time.

runs.description: ShapedRun values in LOGICAL byte-offset order. References text-shaping.md ShapedRun shape.
